task_description: Module 4 COMPUTE mode needs interactive responsiveness: (1) When input values change, output should update automatically, (2) When clicking RANDOM BITS, full pipeline should animate/update, (3) Data path boxes should show LIVE values (not static placeholders), (4) Input entry changes should trigger immediate recompute, (5) Array canvas should highlight active columns/rows during compute, (6) Output labels should update in real-time as inputs change. Currently it's static - user has to click COMPUTE button manually. Need automatic reactive updates like WRITE mode has.
